description: Style Note Created for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touche. Heel: 7 cm Product Details Black straps at forefoot and midfoot with toe hold and ankle straps Black footbed with embossed brand patchTPU outsole Short heel Material and Care Wipe with damp cloth to remove dust
